calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2010 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jonathan Shapiro was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by plaintiff Kirsten Mellor.
No appearance by defendants Dean Alac, a/k/a Alec Dean, or Dina Alac.
Default was entered against defendant Dean Alac, a/k/a Alac Dean, on April 22, 2009.
Default was entered against defendant Dina Alac was filed on April 22, 2009.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant LaSalle Bank National Association as Trustee for Morgan Stanley Mortgage Loan Trust 2006-9R was filed on December 24, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on December 24, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Jonathan Shapiro and Kirsten Mellor, and against the Defaulted Defendants Dean Alac, a/k/a Alac Dean, and Dina Alac as follows:

Damages/Principal - $21,271.00.
Costs - $560.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $21,831.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
